acceptance_criteria: sanitize_identifier and repository_scope_for_path have a single canonical implementation
Priority enum is unified across protocol and core crates
cli_types.rs and web_api_service.rs are split into focused, maintainable modules
description: Eliminate duplicated implementations across crates and unify conflicting type definitions. TASK-031 consolidated sanitize_identifier and repository_scope_for_path. TASK-032 unified Priority type definitions across protocol and core. TASK-041 (in-progress) splits the monolith cli_types.rs and web_api_service.rs into focused modules.
title: Consolidate duplicated code and unify shared types
